title: Easter Egg Hunt
description: Adds multiple large Easter Egg Structures into your world to find and loot. Collect them all for a special item.
body:
Most Current version is 1.20.1!

Newly added versin 1.19.2! (See changelog for slight changes between versions)

Video games are known for their Easter eggs... little hidden gems within the game that only those in the know, know about.

This mod adds 9 new Egg shaped structures, hidden in differnet biomes in the Overworld, Nether and The End. Each one wilol contain a smaller egg which can be used to obtain XP, or craft a powerful item.

A great addition to a holiday pack, or an Easter playthrough. Can you find all 9 eggs?

This Mod also adds CHOCOLATE and chocolate themed building blocks. The Recipe is obained via Advancement, but follows basic vanilla crafting layouts using chocolate "blocks", which can be found in many of the eggs.

MOD PACK DEV'S

You may use this in your modpack. It does not alter any vanilla drops, loot or recipes. Please give due credit.

Hints below:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

There are 9 total structures each with the following Eggs:

Plains Egg, Cave Egg, Frozen Egg, Desert Egg, Forest Egg, Ocean Egg, Mushroom Egg, Nether Egg and End Egg

Some Eggs will be easy to Loot. Othes will have tough mobs, or traps to evade or destroy.

Each Egg Item will be contained within a structure of matching design and type. Its location is more or less hinted at by the name of the egg. Some eggs, such as the Cave Egg, are more common as finding an egg underground is much harder than finding an egg on the surface.

Each Egg structure, of which there are 9 total, will contain loot chest(s) with various loot AND a single "Egg" item". These eggs are non-craftable so if you loose one in the void or lava, you will need to find a new structure.

Collect all 9 to craft the Faberge Egg; a powerful item that grants buffs to the player. 

In addition: You can earn extra XP by smelting any extra eggs that you obtain for 256 XP per standard egg (about 13 levels), or a whopping 15,000 XP for smelting down your treasured Faberge Egg (equivelent to about 74 levels). Smelting the Faberge Egg for XP can only be done ONE TIME. The other eggs can be smelted as many times as you want.

</details>

Additional Recomended Mods:

This mod is of course easter themed and goes well with my other holiday mods:

See my other mods for a complete list of curent holiday themed mods.

Current releases include:
Pot Of Gold!

Christmas Land!

Easter Eggs!

Holloween Craft!

I also highly recomens adding a recipe mode such as Just Enough Items.

Natures Compass is a great mod to aid in some of the harder to find locations.

Great for a single player world, but if playing on a larger server, or a LAN world, I highly suggest adding in a mod that allows the player loot chests to be player specific (in other words, the loot generates for every player).
